calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-108 sec-7 learned-gating settling falsifier -- SAME-LAYER null (frozen magnitude-matched random W_lat at the eligibility/settling field); brake-EXEMPT TERMINAL re-run, supersedes V3-EXQ-700b
items.note: Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-700b_2026-06-24 (user-adjudicated CONCURRENT: V4 loop-segregation + this terminal V3 700c). Replaces 700b's policy-temperature ARM_NOISE (MECH-313 use_noise_floor -- decoupled from the committed-class DV by the F-bounded eligibility constitution; 3 runs of alpha-bumping FAILED) with a SAME-LAYER null = use_learned_settling_step=True + learned_settling_eta=0.0 + a frozen magnitude-matched random W_lat injected into agent.e3.W_lat (the within-eligible accumulator MECH-450 settling acts on), gated behind per-arm field_noise so A0/A2/A3/C3 are byte-identical to 700b. 5 arms (A0/A2_SETTLING_SIGNED/A3_BOTH_SIGNED/C3_SETTLING_UNSIGNED/ARM_NOISE) x 6 seeds, phased P0/P1/P2, landed arithmetic envelope (use_f_eligibility_demotion+adaptive_floor 689e+go_nogo 689g+modulatory-authority/top_k k=3 569i; use_differentiable_cem=False) as a MATCHED CONSTANT, per-seed-divergent gating, committed-action-class entropy DV. PRE-REGISTERED TERMINAL: any further null failure (no verify-lift at the correct layer, or no conversion on a now-verified bar) auto-escalates to V4 loop-segregation -- NO further V3 letters. RE-DERIVE BRAKE EXEMPT (user-adjudicated 2026-06-24: concurrent with V4 escalation, genuine null REDESIGN not an alpha-bump, pre-registered terminal); the brake REFUSES any alpha-bump same-lever requeue. claim_ids=[MECH-439,ARC-108,MECH-450]. ARM-REUSE: REUSE_BASELINE_FROM=None (runs all arms fresh; set to the V3-EXQ-700c-m mint run_id to skip the 4 unchanged arms). PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-439 substrate_ceiling; ARC-108/MECH-450 substrate_conditional). phase3-queue dropped-file hazard: confirm git show HEAD contains this entry before push.
items.machine_affinity_note: Pinned to ree-cloud-4 (user-directed 2026-06-24): 700b ran on ree-cloud-4 (linux-x86_64-py3.10); arm-reuse fingerprint is machine-class-bound so the mint + consumer must share the worker.

items.title: MECH-314 curiosity-conversion DOUBLE-GATED re-test -- use_f_eligibility_demotion=True AND use_go_nogo_constitution=True (MECH-449) BOTH ON, active staleness No-Go injection; brake-EXEMPT redesign, supersedes V3-EXQ-705b; PRE-REGISTERED TERMINAL off-ramp = V4 ARC-110
items.note: Brake-EXEMPT DOUBLE-GATED forward path routed by the confirmed, user-gated failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-705b_2026-06-25 (.md+.json). NEW NUMBER (not a 705 letter): 705b was the FIRST FAIR test of MECH-314 curiosity-conversion under MECH-448/ARC-107 F->eligibility demotion ON (adaptive floor genuinely excluded, excluded_count_mean ~14.45 vs 705's all-admit 0.0; 590c saturation-arm confound fixed; GAP-A e2_world_forward pool divergent ~0.107) and committed-class entropy STILL did not lift over the demotion-ON F-only control + matched-noise => conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_demotion. The re-derive brake FIRED (6th MECH-314 ceiling autopsy) and REFUSES a 705c demotion-ONLY same-substrate letter. This is the autopsy-named brake-EXEMPT REDESIGN: turn the ALREADY-built+validated+provisional MECH-449 Go/No-Go constitution (V3-EXQ-689g PASS 3/3, conversion_rate 1.0; OFF in 705b) ON ALONGSIDE demotion -- use_f_eligibility_demotion=True AND use_go_nogo_constitution=True BOTH ON. Adding a second eligibility gate is a MAJOR-REDESIGN (different substrate condition) per the EXQ versioning rules, hence the new number; supersedes V3-EXQ-705b. Everything else kept verbatim from 705b: 3 arms (ARM_CURIOSITY w=0.25 the SOLE modulatory channel / ARM_FONLY demotion+gonogo-ON F-only control / ARM_NOISE flat-hot matched-noise), GAP-A e2_world_forward divergent pool, use_f_eligibility_adaptive_floor ON, committed-class-entropy DV, phased P0(60)/P1(30) training, hardened legC excluded_count>0 readiness gate, non-vacuity self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a false weakens). CRITICAL NON-VACUITY FIX over a naive flag-flip: dACC is OFF by design (curiosity must stay the sole modulatory channel), so use_go_nogo_constitution=True alone leaves the Go/No-Go gate INERT (no safety/staleness/perseveration signals -> no-op, vacuous double-gate). This experiment ACTIVELY INJECTS a per-tick staleness No-Go signal (recently-committed action classes, RECENCY_WINDOW=1, STALENESS_NOGO_LEVEL=0.9) via agent.set_injected_go_nogo_signals on ALL THREE arms identically (staleness is an ELIGIBILITY filter applied to every arm's candidate set, NOT a modulatory channel -- the curiosity contrast vs the matched F-only double-gated control is preserved). New readiness Leg E (go_nogo_n_soft_applied_mean > 0 on >= MIN_SEEDS seeds) gates the lift criterion BEFORE scoring, so an inert gate self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, never a false reading. PASS (supports MECH-314) = ARM_CURIOSITY committed_class_entropy lifts over the double-gated F-only control by >= margin on >=2/3 seeds AND strict-above ARM_NOISE. PRE-REGISTERED TERMINAL OFF-RAMP: a readiness-met (legC excluded_count>0 AND legE go_nogo fires) no-lift here routes to V4 ARC-110 loop-segregation -- NO further V3 letters on this lineage. RE-DERIVE BRAKE EXEMPT (user-adjudicated 2026-06-25: double-gated redesign adding MECH-449, autopsy-routed -- the brake REFUSES only a demotion-only same-substrate 705c). ARM-REUSE: no separate mint (disqualifier: substrate genuinely in flux for this lineage -- the eligibility constitution changes every letter, so the OFF/F-only arm re-tunes and the fingerprint would correctly refuse; the in-run self-mint covers any strictly-later successor). claim_ids=[MECH-314]; experiment_purpose=evidence; PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-314 remains substrate_ceiling-gated; this is the terminal V3 evidence test). Gates: py_compile + ASCII-clean (0 non-ascii) + validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (per-cell arm_fingerprint; 0 readiness-warnings) + dry-run smoke exit 0 (substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy scale = correct hardened-leg self-route at 1<MIN_SEEDS=2; Go/No-Go gate GENUINELY FIRES -- go_nogo_n_soft_applied 2.25-3.43/arm, proving non-inert; no manifest leaked under evidence/). phase3-queue dropped-file hazard: confirm git show HEAD contains this entry before push.

items.title: MECH-451 finer-channel-granularity validation falsifier -- LETTER iteration (ARM_NOISE magnitude matched to the REALISED A2 learned range at run time + substantive-dissociation near-vacuity guard); test-design re-tune, supersedes V3-EXQ-704
items.note: LETTER iteration routed by the confirmed, user-gated failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-704_2026-06-25 (.md+.json). Scientific question UNCHANGED; substrate already built (substrate action = none). WHY 704 FAILED (precondition_unmet, NOT a falsification): the ARM_NOISE same-layer null injected a frozen random w_chan_finer at a FIXED absolute scale (FCG_NOISE_SCALE=0.5); A2's LEARNED finer-channel dissociation came in tiny (range ~0.00148, only ~15x the 1e-4 floor), so the fixed-scale null was ~176.9x the A2 LEARNED range -> fcg_noise_magnitude_matched ([0.25,4.0]x band) FAILED and the C1 'A2 strict-above ARM_NOISE' bar was meaningless. V3-EXQ-642 invalid-precondition family (control-calibration artifact); MECH-451 UNWEAKENED; re-derive brake NOT fired (1st MECH-451 autopsy; brake-exempt config re-tune). THE FIX (the ONE scientific change; everything else from 704 kept VERBATIM): (1) the ARM_NOISE frozen-random w_chan_finer range is now magnitude-matched AT RUN TIME to the REALISED per-(arm,seed) A2 LEARNED w_chan_finer range (FCG_NOISE_MATCH_TARGET_RATIO=1.0 = centre of the band). Arms run A0,A1,A2,ARM_NOISE in order, so each ARM_NOISE seed's A2 learned range is already measured and the injected deviation is rescaled so its range EQUALS the matched A2 range BY CONSTRUCTION -> the ratio lands in-band; a missing/degenerate A2 range falls back to FCG_NOISE_FALLBACK_SCALE=0.5, which correctly trips the magnitude-match precondition -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. (2) a SUBSTANTIVE-dissociation near-vacuity guard (autopsy Step 7): the A2 LEARNED finer-channel range must clear W_CHAN_FINER_SUBSTANTIVE_RANGE_FLOOR=5e-3 (well above the bare 1e-4 dissociability floor AND above 704's near-vacuous 0.00148) on a strict-majority of seeds; if the finer channels only barely clear the floor ('the compressed blend re-labelled'), the test self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue + non_degenerate=False rather than a misleading no-lift weakens on a knife-edge tiny-structure-vs-tiny-matched-null comparison. KEPT VERBATIM from 704: same GAP-A reef-bipartite foraging substrate, same landed arithmetic envelope (use_f_eligibility_demotion + adaptive_floor 689e + go_nogo 689g + modulatory-authority/top_k k=3 569i) as a MATCHED CONSTANT on all arms, settling W_lat OFF on ALL arms, 4 arms (A0_ENVELOPE_ONLY / A1_GLOBAL_WCHAN / A2_FINER_CHANNELS / ARM_NOISE) x 6 seeds, phased P0/P1/P2 (250 ep/cell), committed-action-class entropy PRIMARY DV. PRE-REGISTERED decisive either way: A2 strict-above A0 AND A1 AND the now-correctly-matched verified-lifting noise bar => REPRESENTATIONAL COMPRESSION confirmed -> supports MECH-451 + PRE-EMPTS the V4 ARC-110 loop-segregation build; A2 finer-weights-MOVE but no lift beyond A1 => compression NOT the binding constraint -> POSITIVE evidence FOR ARC-110 (route to v4_loop_segregation), weakens MECH-451. claim_ids=[MECH-451]; experiment_purpose=evidence; PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-451 candidate / substrate_conditional / v3); recommended substrate_queue action=none. ARM-REUSE: REUSE_BASELINE_FROM=None (runs all arms fresh; ARM_NOISE ineligible -- frozen-random injection; the false cache-miss is free). Gates: py_compile + ASCII-clean (0 non-ascii) + validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (per-cell arm_fingerprint; 0 readiness-warnings) + dry-run smoke exit 0 (substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy scale = correct non-vacuity self-route; runtime-match path executed; no manifest leaked under evidence/). phase3-queue dropped-file hazard: confirm git show HEAD contains this entry before push.
